name: ceo-dev-loop
description: Autonomous CEO-Dev workflow that uses GOAL, STATUS, and DECISIONS handoff files to keep implementation aligned with a project objective.

interface.longDescription: Initialize and run a file-based CEO-Dev workflow where GOAL.md defines scope, STATUS.md tracks execution, and DECISIONS.md records direction changes until the objective is complete.
defaultPrompt: Use $ceo-dev-loop to initialize a GOAL/STATUS/DECISIONS workflow for this project.
Use $ceo-dev-loop to continue the current project loop.
Use $ceo-dev-loop to show the current loop status.
